scripts.build: npm run install:glory && npm run build --prefix Glory/assets/react
scripts.build:fast: npm run install:glory && npm run build:fast --prefix Glory/assets/react
scripts.prerender: npm run install:glory && npm run prerender --prefix Glory/assets/react
scripts.install:all: npm run install:glory && npm install --prefix App/React
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix Glory/assets/react && npm run type-check --prefix App/React
